instructions: Saadiyat Lagoons HSE Scoring Template - Google Form Ready
Use Weekly_Inspections as the response/master record after upload to Google Sheets. Users should complete only visible columns; hidden columns and dashboards update automatically.
2. Complete the visible input columns only. Hidden columns calculate automatically.
3. Score each KPI from 0 to 5. 0 = collapse of control, 5 = excellent sustained control.
4. Package and Cluster are mandatory. Contractor and responsible team auto-populate.
5. Weekly_Dashboard is for top management review. Monthly_Dashboard tracks recognition trend.
6. Gap_Analysis and CAPA_Tracker are for close-out management.

kpi_weights.Notes: Primary fall prevention and work at height control
Continuity and quality of edge protection
Exclusion zones, toe boards, debris/tool control
Barricading, access, services, support, spoil setback
Tagging, inspection, full planking, access, stability
Valid PTW, correct scope, signatories, controls
Physical field verification before permit approval
Lift plan, appointed person, exclusion, rigging
Cleanliness, stacking, access routes, slip/trip control
Fire points, extinguishers, hot work readiness
Temporary power, RCD, condition of tools/cables

weekly_inspections.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
1. Leadership failure
2. Poor supervision
3. Poor sub-contractor control
4. PTW failure
weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken: Unsafe work practices were suspended immediately. The CM of the cluster was called but he refused to visit the location.
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
1. PTW must be controlled by the main contractor.
2. Close supervision of sub-contractors by main contractor shall be ensured.
3. Non-performing subcontractors shall not be paid and shall be removed from project.
4. Non-performing construction team shall be replaced without delays
weekly_inspections.Action_Owner:
1-3rd recommendation by the cluster CM
4th recommendation by the PD.

weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken: The team was commended for their visible leadership in driving transformation at Cluster 8A.
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
The Construction Manager and his team were advised to ensure that sub-contractors do not mess up with their site. The following advise was given:
1. No payment for work if site condition is below the acceptable standard.
2. Close supervision of sub-contractors by the construction team of the main contractor.
3. Housekeeping shall be maintined for all shift.
4. Provide a temporary storage area for waste for each villa.
5. PTW shall remain under the control of the main contractor.
weekly_inspections.Action_Owner:
Construction Manager of Cluster 8A 
HSE Manager of TAJV

weekly_inspections.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
1. Leadership failure

3. Poor sub-contractor control
4. PTW failure
weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken: stopped the unsafe activities , called the area engineer to the location discuss about the corrective and preventive actions
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required: conduct coordination meetings , provide adequate facilities for waste collection

weekly_inspections.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
1. Leadership failure
2. Poor supervision
3. Poor sub-contractor control
4. PTW failure
weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken: All activities inside the visited villa have been suspened and corrective and preventive actions required have been communicated with action owners .
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required: Provide competent supervsion to ensure the activities inline with OSH requirements and proeprly managing the subcontractor.

weekly_inspections.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
1. Poor coordination 
2. Poor sub-contractor control
4. PTW failure
weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken:
1. Maintain the pedestrian access 
2. Reinstate the barricades 
3. Provide access to the villas 
4.Apoint competent scaffolding crew
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
1. Preplan the activities
2. Conduct a week's look-ahead planning to avoid conflicts 
3. Conduct training for the involved teams 
4. Evaluate the competency of the scaffolding crew

Construction manager 
Project Engineer 
HSE officer

weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required: Sub contractor shall be managed based on the project OSH Requirements
Regular Training sessions shall be carried out
Regular scaffolding and Distribution Board inspection
Regular scaffolding and Distribution Board inspection
Regular scaffolding and Distribution Board inspection

weekly_inspections.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
•	HSE Management System Implementation 
•	Planning and Control
•	Inspection, Monitoring, and Compliance
weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken:
•	Unsafe activities were stopped immediately. 
•	Housekeeping, waste removal, and access rectification started
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
Enforce strict supervision and permit compliance.
Implement proper planning, housekeeping, and waste management systems.
Conduct regular inspections, training, and safety awareness programs.

weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken: Worker removed from the villa in adequate access and edge protection
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
•	Enforce strict supervision and permit compliance.
•	Implement proper planning, housekeeping, and waste management systems.
•	Conduct regular inspections, training, and safety awareness programs.
•	Access should always be well-maintained and inspected by a competent person 
•	Permit to work should only be issued if the villa is safe to work in

weekly_inspections.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
1. Communication of OHS procedures 
2. lack of OHS awareness in supervision level 
3. Lack of monitoring
weekly_inspections.Immediate_Action_Taken:
1. Worker removed from the villa 
2. safe access provided by the contractor 
3. allocated people fro material arrangements
weekly_inspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
1. Conduct training and awareness on the site supervision level 
2. Conduct routine inspections
3.

2. Construction Manager

april_schedule.title: April 2026 | 09:00-11:00 | 3 Simultaneous Site Walk Groups
rows: Tuesday = Package 3 only | Thursday = Package 2 & 4 only | Other days = mixed packages
